doc.source: The immutable v2.6 release commit and fixed-output hash resolve to the exact upstream source used by the pinned Nixpkgs Cemu 2.6 recipe.
doc.platforms: This slice is proven only for the Steam Deck's x86_64-linux closure. Evaluation fails on every other host instead of selecting a host, Flatpak, libretro, or prebuilt fallback.
doc.rendering: The TV game path directly invokes the shared ABI 2 renderer after its final draw and before Cemu UI; the post-UI phase runs immediately before Cemu's owned swap. Shader-cache, settings, empty, and secondary-pad-window paths never create a renderer frame.
